'''Sala Natu''' was an officer who served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Stationed at [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] at the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|assault]] on that [[Planet/Legends|world]], he was a specialist who possessed expertise in survival in cold environments.

Natu escaped the planet aboard the [[Bright Hope/Legends|''Bright Hope'']] in the wake of the costly holding action.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Of Possible Futures: The Tale of Zuckuss and 4-LOM|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{1st}}
